title: Connected Signs
description: A mod that allows you to edit multiple wall signs at once if they are adjacent.
body:
A mod that allows you to edit multiple signs at once if they are adjacent.

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader 0.19.2 or later
- Fabric API 0.115.0 or later (**for 1.21.1 versions**)
- Fabric API 0.92.2+1.20.1 or later (**for 1.20.1 versions**)


## Notice
**THIS MOD IS IN ALPHA TESTING RIGHT NOW, IT MAY BE BUGGY!**

**Please report any bugs to github.**

## What does it do?
When placing two signs next to each other on a wall, both signs are treated as one long sign.

![a display of the signs being connected](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/623fcf5d1283fd20a4ff6edf8a980d25d4eebfc3.png)

## Individuality
Signs can be manually set to individual, allowing you to edit the sign as if it was a vanilla sign. 
![a display of the toggle button for sign individuality](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/882188331f93345bf7236b89e553b96e0c20feae.png)
**Note:** Signs automatically seperate based on wood type. there is currently no way to combine multiple sign wood types.

## Roadmap
- Connected Wall Signs [✔️]
- Individual Sign Editing [✔️]
- Connected Floor Signs
- Connected Hanging Signs
- Large Text
